primary_sources.title: We’re releasing prompt-based teen safety policies for gpt-oss-safeguard. They’re designed to help you identify and moderate teen-specific content, and turn safety requirements into classifiers for real-time filtering or offline analysis. https://openai.com/index/teen-safety-policies-gpt-oss-safeguard

Pinned: With Codex, Ryan built @NotionHQ’s AI Voice Input feature entirely by himself. @ryannystrom used Codex to understand the context, point Codex to an existing mobile feature, and ship it to web and desktop while still managing a team.

supporting_sources.title: New from the Anthropic Economic Index: how people’s use of Claude changes with experience. Longer-term users are more likely to iterate carefully with Claude, and less likely to hand it full autonomy. They attempt higher-value tasks, and receive more successful responses.

No unsupported claim that all teams should adopt immediately.
